# Extracao: Module 5

- **Fonte:** Module 5.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

﻿MODULE 5 OPEN CART

Welcome to Module 5 of Product Launch Formula. The Open Cart phase is when you finally start taking orders! By the end of this module, you’ll know exactly what you need at every step of the way, from your Open Cart email sequence to how to script your sales video.

1 Introduction [2 minutes]
This lesson will introduce you to the Open Cart and the strategies to use during the Open Cart.

2 The Open Cart Sequence [19 minutes]
This lesson is about the Open Cart Sequence, which can last anywhere from five to seven days. The start of the sequence is when you open your cart and begin taking sales. The end of the sequence is when you close your cart.

3 Stoked On Selling [16 minutes]
The #1 most important thing to remember about selling is that it's not about the "stuff", it's about the transformation. When you get the transformation right, it makes the sale much easier. That's what this lesson is all about.

4 Bonus Strategies [16 minutes]
Bonuses can often be the difference between a good launch and a great launch, and can help save your launch when it’s not going as planned. In this lesson you'll learn how to use bonuses strategically to strengthen your offer.

5 Sales Strategies [19 minutes]
From payment plans to countdown timers, this lesson covers some of the key strategies and tactics to use during your Open Cart to boost your conversions.

6 Creating Your Sales Video [34 minutes]
This lesson walks you through the steps and key considerations in creating your sales video, including scripting your sales video and the various sales video mechanics and strategies that can make all the difference during your Open Cart.

7 Sales Video Walkthroughs [128 minutes]
In these case studies, you'll see a walkthrough of real-life examples of Sales Videos created by PLF Owners.

8 Sales Page Walkthroughs [10 minutes]
In this lesson, you’ll see a walkthrough of two different Sales Pages and Checkout Pages.

9 Open Cart Planner [no video]
The Open Cart Planner is a step-by-step summary of this module and includes a checklist to keep you on track during this final phase of your launch.

10 Post-Launch Email Sequence [18 minutes]
Welcome to the Post-Launch Email Sequence Bonus. This is about what to send your launch list and new clients after your launch ends. A good post-launch email sequence will reinforce to your customers that they made the right decision, and keep your prospects engaged.
